summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Shubhankar Tiwari's Next.js portfolio website. Tested all core features including theme toggling, recruiter mode functionality, responsive design, navigation effects, and content verification across all sections.
passed_tests: Page loads with dark theme by default
Theme toggle (sun/moon icon) switches between dark and light modes correctly
Recruiter mode toggle changes About section from narrative to bullet points
Recruiter mode toggle changes Experience section content style
Experience cards expand/collapse on click with detailed content
Navigation glass-morphism effect activates on scroll (backdrop-filter: blur(20px))
All social links present and working (GitHub, LinkedIn, Kaggle, Email) in hero section
Resume link accessible (/Shubhankar_Tiwari_Resume.pdf - returns 200)
Projects section shows 3 projects with Indian Desi LLM featured (full width)
Project external links working (GitHub for project 0, Kaggle for project 2)
Skills section shows 4 skill groups with proper tags
Credentials section shows 3 items (Kaggle Expert, B.Tech, ML certifications)
Engineering Principles section shows 4 numbered principles
Footer contains all 5 social links (GitHub, LinkedIn, Kaggle, Twitter, Email) plus email
Scroll-triggered animations working across all sections
Light mode colors correct - dark text (rgb(24,24,27)) on light background (rgb(250,250,250))
Mobile responsive layout working (390px width tested)
Mobile navigation adapts correctly (resume link hidden, theme toggle visible)
About section stats cards display correctly (4 cards with proper values)
Experience section shows 2 experience cards with expandable content
